name: eslint-plugin-musaium-test-discipline
description: Workspace ESLint plugin enforcing Musaium test discipline (no inline test entities, factory adoption).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts src/rules/no-inline-test-entities.ts src/rules/no-typeorm-set-undefined.ts src/rules/no-undisabled-test-discipline-disable.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node22 --external:eslint --outdir=dist
